channel.title: Ofertas Diarias de Audio Plugin Guy (2026-05-19)

item.title: [SAVE BIG] [HOT] Solid State Logic|Get 89% off SSL Native X-Comp by Solid State Logic. The discounted price is $10.?NEW

item.title: [HOT] Acustica Audio|Acustica has released AERO 2 pedal, amplifier and cabinet sim plugin for Win & Mac, featuring 251 emulations. The intro is 55% off.?NEW
